entries.title: Exodus 28:20
entries.author: Adam Clarke (1760–1832)
entries.content: Verse 4 Lay his hand upon the bullock's head - See Clarke's note on Lev 1:4.

entries.title: Exodus 28:35
entries.author: Adam Clarke (1760–1832)
entries.content: Verse 22 When a ruler hath sinned - Under the term נשיא nasi, it is probable that any person is meant who held any kind of political dignity among the people, though the rabbins generally understand it of the king. A kid of the goats was the sacrifice in this case, the rites nearly the same as in the preceding cases, only the fat was burnt as that of the peace-offering. See Lev 4:26 and Lev 3:5.
